Source: Power Automate What's New
URL: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/power-automate/whats-new
Fetched: 2026-03-22

# Power Automate What's New

## Overview
Power Automate releases weekly service updates with new features, fixes, and improvements.

## Key Resources
- Service Updates: /en-us/power-platform/released-versions/power-automate
- Release Planner: https://releaseplans.microsoft.com/en-US/?app=Power+Automate

## Key Features
- Cloud flows, desktop flows, scheduled flows
- AI copilot in cloud flows, Process Mining, and desktop flows
- Process mining and task mining
- Solutions for ALM
- Teams, SharePoint, email integration

Note: Releases are rolled out over several days. New or updated functionality might not appear immediately.

Page last updated (ms.date): 2025-07-10
Document last updated: 2025-07-11
